title: Splitting Into Rescue Teams
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on splitting into rescue teams within the The Road Poneglyph and the Next Routes storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I knew that straw hat looked familiar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Recalling memories of days past!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Inuarashi said the same thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you all know shanks?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, neko and I both, for a time, rode aboard Roger's ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WhaAAAAT?! You're telling me you two were also part of the pirate King's crew?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I guess you could say that...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We were aboard the ship as Lord Oden's vassals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: same for the time period we were aboard whitebeard's Moby Dick.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We also were beside him when he was scouted out by Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait just a second! White- beard?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: In terms of how long ago it was, well, we weren't any older and not much more important than the sort of "apprentices" that shanks and buggy once were.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oi! Hold it! Wait a bloody sec!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can't keep up with all of this info!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The two of us didn't accompany Roger to Rafiel, though.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Okay so first... Oden and Inu and neko both were on whitebeard's ship, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh man, that takes me back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Those were the days, I tell ya"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: New races! New places! New climes! Sights unseen, all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A sea of clouds floating in the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Islands floating on the sea floor! Sunlight shining!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Each and every day, our hearts and bodies leaping for joy! breath- taking days of adventure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Weren't you two trying to kill each other like ten min-utes ago?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kinemon, were you and the others on whitebeard's ship too!?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: No. We remained in Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In fact, we tried our best to convince Lord Open not sail aboard a pirate's ship!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Wano Country is an isolationist one.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Leaving its borders is a crime!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: regarding the laws of his own country. He was quite the maverick.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yet Lord often always harbored Reserve- Tions...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We made our acquaintance with Whitebeard and Roger briefly when they landed at Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: They had a sense of honor about them; I do not think them bad men. However, for a daimyo of the wano country to go aboard a pirate vessel... it was unprecedented, to say the least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As his retainers we...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whatever! The important thing is, you all know shanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What about Rayleigh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you sailed with Roger, that means you had a chance to be aboard the pro Jackson,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A ship constructed by my master, Tom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHAT?! You're ship- Wright Tom's apprentice?!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Then surely you must know the doctor, cro-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hold that thought, brook!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Sorry for interrupting you but I need to get something straight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm starting to get worried about our route.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?

summary: Splitting Into Rescue Teams: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
